query:
UPDATE grading_jobs
        SET status = $3,
            finished_at = $4,
            lease_expires_at = NULL
        WHERE id = $1
          AND worker_id = $2
          AND lease_expires_at > $4
          AND (
            (
                status = $6
                AND (
                    cancel_requested_at IS NULL
                    OR $5
                )
            )
            OR (
                $5
                AND status = $7
                AND cancel_requested_at IS NOT NULL
            )
          )
